description: QCB eKYC: record retention requirement vs Madad onboarding policy

input.control_statement: The regulated entity must retain all eKYC records, including customer identity documents, biometric data, liveness check results, and verification logs, for a minimum period of ten (10) years from the date of the last transaction or termination of the customer relationship.

metadata.notes: Section 4 (Record Keeping) and Section 2.4 of the Madad policy address record retention
